name: std-thread-email-threaded
description: Email-threaded — Gmail/Outlook/Mail.app split-pane: left message list (sender, subject, preview), right pane shows the focused message with from/to/subject header and quoted-reply nested tree. For helpdesk email threads, support tickets, document discussions that read like email.

schema.name: std-thread-email-threaded
schema.description: Email-threaded — Gmail/Outlook/Mail.app split-pane: left message list (sender, subject, preview), right pane shows the focused message with from/to/subject header and quoted-reply nested tree. For helpdesk email threads, support tickets, document discussions that read like email.

fields.name: parentId
fields.description: Identifier of the parent message in the thread.

fields.name: threadRootId
fields.description: Identifier of the top-level message in the thread.
fields.synonyms: root id, top id, original id

fields.name: authorId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the post's author.

fields.name: authorName
fields.description: The name of the post's author.

fields.name: fromAddress
fields.description: The email sender's address.

fields.name: toAddress
fields.description: Recipient(s) of the email message.

fields.name: subject
fields.description: The title or heading of the message.

fields.name: preview
fields.description: A short excerpt of the post's content.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The main text of the post's message.

fields.name: voteCount
fields.description: The number of votes or ratings associated with this item.

fields.name: replyCount
fields.description: The number of replies to this post.
fields.synonyms: count, number of replies, response count

fields.name: replies
fields.description: Nested replies to this post, forming a threaded conversation.

fields.name: focusedRow
fields.description: The complete, rendered content of the currently selected message.

emits.description: Indicates a post or reply has been chosen for interaction.
Indicates a new reply has been created and added to the thread.
Indicates a reply has been modified.
Signals a new reply has been successfully submitted.
Indicates a reply creation was aborted by the user.
Signals a thread post has been successfully retrieved.
Indicates a failure to load a thread post.
emits.synonyms: load error, fetch failed, retrieval failed

emits.description: A new post has been added to the thread.
Indicates a failure to create a new thread post.

events.name: ThreadPost loaded
events.description: Signals a thread post has been successfully retrieved.

events.name: ThreadPost load failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load a thread post.
events.synonyms: load error, fetch failed, retrieval failed

events.name: Reply
events.description: Indicates a new reply has been created and added to the thread.

events.name: ThreadPost created
events.description: A new post has been added to the thread.

events.name: Select
events.description: Indicates a post or reply has been chosen for interaction.

events.name: Edit Reply
events.description: Indicates a reply has been modified.

events.name: Submit Reply
events.description: Signals a new reply has been successfully submitted.

events.name: Cancel Reply
events.description: Indicates a reply creation was aborted by the user.

events.name: ThreadPost create failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to create a new thread post.

detailToBinding.description: Detail-pane binding for the To address.

bodyContent.label: Body content tree
bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after thread posts load. Default is the canonical forum-style data-list. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (chat bubbles, email-threaded cards, linear comment stacks, etc.) to deliver entirely different thread UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

emailPreviewBinding.label: emailPreviewBinding
emailPreviewBinding.description: List-pane binding for the message preview text.

flat.label: Flat thread
flat.description: Render replies as a linear list instead of nested tree

replyAuthorBinding.label: replyAuthorBinding
replyAuthorBinding.description: Reply binding for the reply author.

threadRootId.label: Root post id
threadRootId.description: Top-level post whose descendants are loaded (blank = all roots)

detailSubjectBinding.label: detailSubjectBinding
detailSubjectBinding.description: Detail-pane binding for the focused message subject.

replyFromBinding.label: replyFromBinding
replyFromBinding.description: Reply binding for the reply From address.

detailContentBinding.label: detailContentBinding
detailContentBinding.description: Detail-pane binding for the message body.

replyDateBinding.label: replyDateBinding
replyDateBinding.description: Reply binding for the reply timestamp.

emailSubjectBinding.label: emailSubjectBinding
emailSubjectBinding.description: List-pane binding for the message subject.

tableLook.label: Table look
tableLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the data table rendered by this atom.

replyContentBinding.label: replyContentBinding
replyContentBinding.description: Reply binding for the reply body.

detailAuthorBinding.label: detailAuthorBinding
detailAuthorBinding.description: Detail-pane binding for the focused message author.

emailAuthorBinding.label: emailAuthorBinding
emailAuthorBinding.description: List-pane binding for the message author.

detailFromBinding.label: detailFromBinding
detailFromBinding.description: Detail-pane binding for the From address.

fields.name: parentId
fields.description: Identifier of the parent ThreadPost in a nested thread.

fields.name: threadRootId
fields.description: Identifier of the top-level thread this post belongs to.

fields.name: authorId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the post's author.

fields.name: authorName
fields.description: The name of the post's author.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The main text content of the post.

fields.name: voteCount
fields.description: The number of votes associated with this item.

fields.name: replyCount
fields.description: The number of replies to this post.
fields.synonyms: count, number of replies, child posts

fields.name: replies
fields.description: A list of child ThreadPost entities.

fields.name: focusedRow
fields.description: The currently selected or active row within the thread.
